data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo/video evidence attachments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of photo/video evidence attachments, which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of these attachments within the saga lifecycle. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga but do not address the specific requirement for photo/video evidence, indicating a lack of coverage.
gaps: Photo/video evidence attachments are not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of photo/video evidence attachments.
